description: Research archive for Steven Woods' Canberra period, combining CSIRO work, Canberra life, and hockey with the Canberra Knights.
person_context: Steven Woods spent 1991 to 1992 in Canberra, working at CSIRO and playing hockey for the Canberra Knights.
focus_value: CSIRO references, Knights records, and Australian local context
current_focus: CSIRO references, Knights records, and Australian local context
